narrative:
New Castle Twp township has 285 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.9 percentage points.
